messages.message: I propose a temporary non-aggression pact between our two powers. I will avoid moving into Trieste or Venice, and you avoid pushing into my supply centers. We could both benefit from focusing on France or Turkey instead.

Hi Germany! Would you be interested in cooperating to stop the western juggernaut that so frequently dominates the game? I think that our two nations make natural allies given our central positioning and how our forces can move outward from one another without being a threat to each other!
Italy has no interest in provoking France. If you are looking to focus on Germany, I would be open to a mutual agreement to stay out of each other's way in the Mediterranean and Western Europe.

Hey Russia! I reckon we can do a lot more together than against one another, and working together is by far my favourite option when playing Turkey.

Would you be down for a bit of a classic juggernaut?
Hey France! I know we have to figure out the channel but I think it might be beneficial if we agree not to go there. What are your thoughts?
Hey Russia! Any interest in splitting Scandinavia? I'm happy to let you have Sweden if you let me have Norway!

Hey England! I am very happy with that - I think the northern front is a very good place to have a stalemate and we both have a better use of units if we don't have to defend. I have no ambitions in the north other than Sweden.
If Germany is on board with you I would be willing to talk about you getting Belgium as well, but I assume you will be aiming for both centres and that's cool.

Hey Turkey! I would love a classic Juggernaut. We can even use this game to prove to the others that the two of us are likely to fight.

I will try to convince Austria that we are trying to break up the Juggernaut in the first year. Let's bounce in the Black Sea for now?
I think that works for me. Neither of us have any reason to move into the Channel other than to attack the other. So we can agree to stay out of the channel.

Turkey, we are both Mediterranean powers. I suggest we coordinate to avoid conflict in the region. I could support your moves toward Greece or the Balkans if you ensure my southern flank remains unchallenged.
Absolutely. It would make no sense for us to attack one another given how many other enemies we both have to face. Can we agree to leave Piedmont and the Mediterranean unoccupied?
Hey France, I'm very happy to do that. Is England on board? What are your thoughts for this year?
After you take Bulgaria we can figure out the best way to move forward from there.
Well first of all, we need to determine how to divide Belgium and Holland.
Sounds good
Absolutely, I think an Austro-italian war is very very bad for both powers. Let me know what I can do to help you against Turkey.
What are your thoughts on Holland and Denmark?
Sounds good! I'll let you know if Germany responds

Hey Germany! What are your thoughts for the first couple turns? If you let me into Sweden I am willing to work with you against England or Austria (whichever you prefer). I don't have any ambitions in the north and can be convinced to stay out if you'd like.

Otherwise, I would at least like to bounce in Silesia or Prussia with you, if you'd prefer that.
Are you looking to go for Holland or Norway?
Hi Russia, I would prefer we kept a DMZ in Prussia and Silesia. Obviously I'd like Sweden, but if you move to Stp from Moscow you could support me into Norway in 1902? Would you be interested?
I'd like to put in a word with you as well. Would you be willing to agree not to move your army in Venice to Piedmont, and in return I will agree to not build any fleets in Marseilles?
Thanks. I have also gotten messages from Germany, so hopefully they are on board with you.
Hey Italy! I agree that we make much better friends than foes, and I am looking forward to our friendship! Would you be open to a joint attack on Austria in the near future?
Wonderful!
I think a DMZ in Prussia and Silesia is great. I'm not quite sure where I'm going in Moscow yet, but if you are in Norway in 1902 I'll likely be down to help.
Norway, at least initially
Ok cool.
That sounds reasonable. I am happy to focus on Turkey instead of each other. If you are open to it, we could coordinate our moves in the Balkans to avoid overlapping pressure.
Hi Austria! I know we aren't in a position to directly help one another just yet, but we do have a mutual neighbor in Italy. I'd like to know your thoughts about the Italian player.
I accept your proposal. I will refrain from moving my army from Venice to Piedmont this turn, and I expect your fleet to stay out of Marseilles. Let's work together to avoid unnecessary conflict.
Hey Germany! Any interest in splitting Holland and Belgium?
Sounds good to me. I will bounce in the black sea and then we can attack Serbia/bulgaria together in the fall
Hey England, sounds good to me. Are you going for the English Channel? I'd suggest it for you! I'll be taking Denmark obviously, and we can discuss the rest after we've seen opening moves.
Hello, I have no bad feelings about the Italian player so far.
Wonderful
That would be great. Where are you moving Moscow? Will you take Rumania?
Fantastic.
For now I am moving to Ukraine but will likely end up taking Rumania

A joint attack on Austria may be tempting, but I believe a temporary truce with Austria allows us to consolidate our positions first. Let's focus on securing our flanks and building strength before targeting common enemies.
What are you thinking?
Hey Austria! What are your thoughts for this game? Obviously we have to work together or we'll just be squashed by Russia and Turkey.
Hey, are you ok with me taking Belgium?
Okay, that makes sense. Are you working with Turkey against Austria?
Why don't you take Holland?
Hello Russia, what are your thoughts for the game?

Your proposal is acceptable. I will hold my army in Venice and refrain from moving toward Piedmont this turn, and I expect your fleet to remain out of Marseilles. Let’s keep the peace in the west so we can focus on greater opportunities elsewhere.
I agree, do you want to play nice with Italy and I so we can work on the other side of the board?
Hey Austria! Well Germany is the only player I've heard from, so I don't have much of an idea yet. Do you have any plans?
Yes, for now I am working with Turkey against Austria. I will move to Galicia and probably build in Moscow depending on how things go with Turkey and Austria.
Me neither. I just wanted to open a dialogue between our two nations

I appreciate your enthusiasm for cooperation, Turkey. While a joint attack on Austria may come in time, I believe we should first secure our own flanks. For now, I propose we remain neutral toward each other and build strength in our respective regions.
I think I have convinced Germany that I am planning on attacking you, so I will be moving to Galicia (which Austria will likely bounce).
Agreed.
Hey Turkey, I think Russia and I would both like to work with you. Let me know your thoughts.
Italy wants to be friends, and you?
Hi Turkey! I know we don't have any particularly pressing issues to discuss at the moment, but I thought I'd reach out and open a dialogue between our two nations!
Hi Russia! I know we don't have any particularly pressing issues to discuss at the moment, but I thought I'd reach out and open a dialogue between our two nations!
Sounds good!

I am open to cooperation. As I told France and Turkey, I propose a temporary truce between us. I will not move into Venice or Trieste, and I suggest we both focus our attention outward — perhaps toward France or Turkey — rather than inward.
I'm very happy to do so!
Sounds good to me!
Nice work! Hopefully he will be easier to deal with than Austria. Have you heard from him?

I appreciate your enthusiasm, Turkey! A joint attack on Austria may come — but only after we’ve secured our positions. For now, let’s focus on mutual defense in the region. I will hold off from Venice and Trieste, and I expect your forces to stay away from my southern flank.

Hi France! I appreciate your kind words, and I hope that we can work together at some point in the future.

Have you heard anything from Italy? I can't get a read on his intentions
Great!
Austria and Italy both just said hi and asked if I have any plans. That's all I've heard from them.
Thanks France! If you've got any ideas about your opening strategy or how the board is shaping up let me know. I haven't heard much from your neighbours, but maybe I'll get some useful information.
Hi Germany! Working with Russia sounds like a great plan to me. You guys will probably be focused on the north early on, but I would love to join in and push south with you in the future
Hey Italy! If you have any strategy or opening ideas let me know. I haven't heard much from your neighbours but maybe I'll get some useful information from them.
Agreed, I think we can split the Turkish scs

Hm, Italy is being strange with me. I think he may be working with Austria against me.

I have asked Germany if he is down to join us in an attack on Austria, so hopefully he will tell us the truth about his intentions

Italy seeks peace and cooperation between us. I have no interest in moving into Trieste or Venice this turn, and I suggest we both focus outward — perhaps toward France or Turkey — rather than inward.
Agreed. I will hold my army in Venice and refrain from moving toward Piedmont this turn. Let’s maintain peace in the west so we can focus on greater opportunities elsewhere.
Alright, will do!
Agreed. I will hold my army in Venice and refrain from moving toward Piedmont this turn. Let’s maintain peace in the west so we can focus on greater opportunities elsewhere.
Do you want to team up against Germany?
Hey Austria! Just wanted to open the lines of communication with you. I think we could be strong allies if we work together. Are you open to an attack on Russia?
What are your thoughts on Austria?
I've heard from him, but he's not really clear on what his intentions are either.
Have you heard from him at all?
Glad to hear it!
That might be a good plan. Are you planning on convoying an army to Belgium then?
I think I might be moving against Germany. Would you be interested in joining?
Sounds like a plan to me. My fleet in Smyrna will hold, so you don't have to worry about your southern flank.
I'm not sure that would work for me because I'm committed against Austria but I wish you luck.

Russia, I’m focused on securing my position in the Mediterranean and Balkans for now. If you’re looking to build strength in Eastern Europe, we might find opportunities to avoid conflict. Let me know your plans!
I appreciate your openness. If we’re to focus outward, let’s clarify how we both intend to handle Turkey or France. Coordination could be key to avoiding overlap.
I am not sure that Italy is going to be moving against Austria at the moment. I think he is either trying to mislead you or trying to get you to attack me.
I am very open to that
Yeah, that's the plan
Let’s confirm our mutual understanding: we’ll avoid conflict for now. If you’re considering moves toward Greece or the Balkans, I’d be interested in hearing your plans.
Yeah, he definitely has that vibe. I think he will prove to be a tricky opponent.
Hey Italy! For now I am focusing on taking down Austria and Germany, so you may be able to gain some of their supply centres if you're interested.
Hi Italy! What are your thoughts for this game?
A little, but only about Italy and Turkey, nothing about you.
Ok great.
Yeah, I'm trying to get him to move into Trieste but we'll see how that goes.
Yeah me neither. We'll see after this turn!
That’s reassuring to hear, Turkey. If your fleet in Smyrna will hold, I can focus on securing my own flank and possibly supporting you if needed. Let’s keep communication open.
Russia, your focus on Austria and Germany suits me well. I’ll keep my units in check and avoid conflict with your ambitions to the north. Let’s see if we can both benefit from a quiet western front.
Thanks!
Good luck to you as well!

I appreciate your openness earlier. Let’s follow through on our mutual understanding—no moves into Venice or Trieste this turn. Perhaps we can discuss coordinated efforts against France or Turkey soon.
Yeah, if we can get him to attack Austria I think we'll be in a great position

Germany, I’m focused on securing my Mediterranean position and expanding into the Balkans. For now, I intend to keep things peaceful with neighboring powers like Austria and France. Let’s see where our paths cross.
I'm open to working together against Turkey, they are the more pressing threat to us both. I don't plan on moving against Russia.

Russia, I appreciate your focus on Austria and Germany — it suits my strategy perfectly. I will keep my units in check and avoid any moves that might interfere with your northern ambitions. Let’s maintain this peaceful coexistence and see where the game takes us.
I think they will take the Tunis build first
Nice!
Yeah that would make sense.
Shall we split the Balkan centres evenly?

I agree with your assessment — Turkey is a growing threat to both of us. I suggest we coordinate our efforts to push back against their expansion into the Balkans. For now, I will continue to hold off from Venice and Trieste.
You get Bulgaria and Rumania, I get Serbia and Greece?

Germany, I'm focused on securing my Mediterranean position and expanding into the Balkans. I have no interest in conflict with your power at this time — let’s keep things peaceful between us as we each pursue our regional goals.
That sounds good to me!

Germany, I foresee a stable Mediterranean if we maintain our current posture. I have no interest in moving toward Trieste or Vienna this turn, and I expect peace along our borders. Let’s focus on our own regions for now.
I've talked to him a bit and he seems convinced that I am going to attack Austria and will move accordingly. We'll see what happens after the first turn!
I'm moving from Trieste to Albania, just FYI

I agree that Turkey is a more pressing threat than our neighbors. I propose we continue our temporary truce and focus on ensuring our mutual flanks remain secure. I will hold my units in Rome and Venice this turn.
I agree, let's have peace.
Yeah, that seems like a good idea to me!
Hey Italy! Do you have any plans regarding France?
Hey Austria! Do you have any plans regarding Russia?
Great
Russia, I appreciate your neutrality toward me. With your focus on the east and north, I can consolidate in the south. Let’s continue this peaceful coexistence and avoid unnecessary conflict.
Sure, that seems reasonable
Hey Turkey! Do you have any plans regarding Russia?
No, I don't plan on moving against them
England, my focus is on securing the Mediterranean and Balkans — France is not my priority at this stage. I foresee opportunities to build strength before considering broader conflicts.
Agreed, Germany. Let’s keep our borders quiet so we can each focus on our strategic goals — I’ll remain neutral toward your movements, and I expect the same from you.
I think we will be busy with our other neighbours for a while
Very good
Great, thanks
If you move against France after taking Tunis we can move into Turkey with the units you've got in the West and my units in the East.
Hi England! Right now I'm still trying to figure out my plans, but I will let you know when I figure them out! I take it you are going to attack him from the north?
I appreciate your support. Let’s continue coordinating against Turkey or France if the opportunity arises. For now, I’ll keep my units in Rome and Venice and avoid Trieste.
Alright, just wondering. Let me know if you change your mind!
Of course! I was just wondering where you stood. If I hear anything that would be beneficial for you I'll let you know!
How are you feeling about Italy? He is making some pretty aggressive demands of me

That sounds like a promising strategy — coordinating against Turkey would be beneficial for both of us. I'll keep my forces focused on securing my flank while we plan for future moves. Let's stay in touch about timing.
No, I don't have any plans to attack him at the moment. I was just curious if he was planning on attacking me!
I look forward to working with you
He's not very talkative with me
Certainly, and I'd appreciate any intel you can share.
Russia and Turkey are both making nice to me
Yeah, he is making pretty unreasonable demands from me too.
Haha ok, I am happy to hear that
England has just told me that he has no plans on attacking you, so I reckon you will be able to focus on the south
What were the demands?
What are your plans for the north?
Basically that he wanted me to not build any fleets
So I was a bit surprised he wanted to dictate your build, but then I had not communicated with him very much at all.
So, I wouldn't trust him.
Yeah, that seems like a good idea.
Both have been nice to me, too
Same, it's nice to have friendly neighbours, even if you aren't going to fight over the same areas.
Haha, I know!
So are you on board for the Germany attack?
Absolutely. I've been trying to get Russia on board, but he isn't interested.
Have you heard anything from him?
The two of us have an agreement to split Sweden and Norway between us. I'll probably build in Stp but it'll be a fleet and won't interfere with anything.
Makes sense to me
I'm glad we are on the same page
I think the three of us will make a good alliance
I completely agree.
Hey Germany! Austria seems to be focused on the east, so I won't be moving into Galicia.
I'm assuming that you've already heard from Austria?
Yep. They are in full "we aren't working together" mode
So they are pretty transparent with their intentions
Haha, they've both been telling me the same thing
I should have more information about Russia's intentions in the north after the first moves go through. I hope that we can have a mutually beneficial relationship
Sounds good!
So, you want to bounce in the Black Sea or try to move your fleet to Constantinople?
Hmm, alright. He seemed fine with me taking Norway.
Let's go ahead and bounce, and then see how things look in the fall
Okay, so you're moving into Gal from War?
Thanks for the intel!
Would you be interested in moving on France with me?
Sounds good
How are you and Italy?
Great.
So what are your thoughts on attacking Germany?
They seem pretty committed to the Balkans, which seems to indicate that they are going to be fighting there for a while, so they might be a good ally for us.
Alright
Are you planning on moving a fleet or an army to Belgium?
I would prefer if you used a fleet to take Belgium
Oh, well that's fine then. I will take it with my fleet.
I don't know if you've been talking to Italy at all, but I think it might be in our best interests if he were to take action against Austria
Have you and Turkey decided how to split the Balkans?
Have you and Russia decided how to split the Balkans?
I don't think Italy is going to make a move against Austria.
I guess he just wants to secure the Balkans
We're still in discussions, but so far we have an understanding

Thank you for your support. I appreciate the offer — if you hear of any opportunities in the Mediterranean or Western Europe, please do keep me informed. I remain focused on consolidating my position.
Hi Italy, interesting moves. Are you going to Tunis? You could also take Marseilles with Pie if you wanted.
You're welcome — I appreciate your neutrality and focus to the north. Let's continue this peaceful coexistence and keep our lines of communication open for future coordination.
Alright, let me know if there's anything I can do to help

Thank you for the suggestion, Germany. While Marseilles is tempting, my fleet is currently focused on securing a stronger naval presence in the Mediterranean. I may consider your idea if opportunities arise or if France shifts its position.
I'm pretty annoyed by Italy right now. I'll try to get some info from him to see if he is going for Greece or Tunis
Hmm, yeah that is kind of weird.
We’re following through on our Spring agreement. I’m ready to support your movement into Serbia if needed, but I’m also keeping a close eye on Albania. Let’s stay coordinated.
I appreciate it! I'll let you know
Thanks, I'll let you know!
We'll see what happens, maybe they're heading to France?
I agree. Looks like Austria is gunning for Greece, maybe you can get into Trieste?
Are you and Russia allied?
I appreciate your cooperation so far. With Austria’s focus in Serbia, I believe now is the time to consider joint action on Albania. Let’s discuss how we might coordinate.
Would you be willing to support my move into Belgium?

Thank you for your suggestion, Germany. While Marseilles is tempting, I’m currently focused on securing Albania and expanding into the Balkans. If France remains neutral, I may shift my attention to Tunis in the future.
Yeah, I don't see why he would make a move like that if he isn't headed for Greece.
I would like to do that, but I don't think I can risk making an enemy of Austria so early. I'm not really in a position to help you out this fall, but maybe next year?
We are friendly, but I wouldn't say that we are allied. Why do you ask?
Okay, what are your thoughts for next year?
Yes, but it seems likely that he will convoy to Greece this turn.
Absolutely, I was thinking the same thing

If Austria is targeting Greece, that could be advantageous for us. However, Trieste is still contested by Austria and potentially vulnerable to my army out of Venice. Let’s monitor the situation closely.
Fair enough. Keep me posted!
Great
With Austria’s recent moves into Serbia, Albania is now exposed. I suggest we coordinate an offensive on Albania—my army from Venice could move to Trieste or Albania, depending on your plans.
Are you planning on moving against Germany, or moving east to attack Austria?
Yeah, that's what I think too
I guess we'll have to wait and see.
Yeah, they may be trying to grab both Tunis and Greece
Yep
Great, Italy wants to go to Tunis to get that build
Yeah
Hey Russia, what's your plan in Galicia?
Just trying to figure out what my neighbors are up to. If there is anything I can do to help, let me know!
I remain committed to our coordination. If you move further into Serbia, I’m prepared to support your flank or take Albania as agreed.
Will do! Thanks for checking
Nice, I can block him out of Greece this turn

I remain focused on the Balkans and Mediterranean expansion for now. I have no immediate plans to move against Germany, and my coordination with Austria allows me to pressure Turkey and Albania without risking a two-front conflict. If France wishes to assist in securing Tunis later, we could discuss a joint effort.
According to Austria, Italy plans on going to Tunis
I appreciate your confirmation. I suggest we finalize our coordination on Albania. If you are moving into Serbia, I will push from Venice toward Trieste or Albania depending on your needs.
Ok that makes sense. Good luck!
Of course! Have you decided how to split the Balkans with Russia, Turkey, and Austria?

With Austria’s focus eastward, Albania is vulnerable. If Turkey is willing, I propose we coordinate a simultaneous move—my army from Venice to Trieste, and your forces to Albania—to push Austria back and claim the supply center.

Thank you for your response. While Russia’s interests lie further north, I believe our mutual neutrality can remain stable if we monitor Austria’s movements closely. For now, Italy will focus on securing Albania and the Balkans.
I may be willing to help against Germany once I have more units.
What's your thinking? Are you going to try for Brest?
Thank you for your support. Our coordination remains key to maintaining stability in the Mediterranean. If opportunities arise in Tunis or elsewhere, I will be sure to consult with you.
Do you want me to support you into Greece from Serbia? That way we will bounce him out and I can move into Serbia from Bulgaria

England, I appreciate your inquiry. While Italy is focused on the Balkans, I remain open to future cooperation in the Mediterranean. For now, I will keep Austria and Turkey engaged to ensure stability.
Wonderful!
Probably, unless you have a better suggestion?
Turkey, with Austria’s focus in Serbia, Albania remains vulnerable. I propose we coordinate an offensive soon—I can move my army from Venice to Trieste while your forces pressure Albania.
Absolutely
Let me know if I can do anything to help in the Mediterranean.
Makes sense

Thank you, France! Your support is appreciated. For now, I will focus on securing Albania and expanding into the Balkans. If opportunities arise in Tunis or elsewhere in the Mediterranean, I will be sure to consult with you.
That sounds good to me.
That seems sensible.
I remain committed to our coordination. Given your movement into Serbia, I propose my army from Venice moves to Trieste to support your flank while we pressure Albania together.
Yes, I'm moving to Serbia
Have you spoken to France at all?
Yeah, that's the plan
Ok cool. Good luck in the Balkans.
Do you know what Russia's plans are for the near future?
Right now I just have it holding
I'm all ears. What did you have in mind?
Or bouncing, but no one is really going to be moving.
I take it you're not moving into Galicia this turn?
Also, have you heard anything from Germany?
No, Germany hasn't said much to me
No I'm not. I was originally going to, but now I think I'm going to hold
Are we bouncing again in the Black Sea?
Alright, thanks
So what is your plan with the fleet in the North Sea?
I have spoken to France a little, but it's not really useful at this point. What are your thoughts on the future?
Great, just wanted to check.
Np

With Austria’s forces tied up in Serbia, Albania is vulnerable. I propose a synchronized move: my army from Venice to Trieste, and your forces targeting Albania. This could push Austria back and allow us to claim the supply center.
Have you decided how to split the Balkans?
I'm not sure, still trying to figure out my moves
I am fine with holding if you want to do something with your fleet in Sev
or Sev
I'm probably just going to leave it

Given Austria's confirmed movement into Serbia, I propose we act swiftly on Albania. My army from Venice can move to Trieste to support your flank, while you push into Albania. This could force Austria to divert resources and allow us to secure the supply center.
I'd rather not get greedy and move it into Rumania if that's all right with you
Ok, well I'm planning on moving to Belgium.
No, I haven't heard much
I think he's going for a move into Norway
Yeah, that's fine with me
Thanks!
I'm still trying to figure that out
Have you decided whether you want to convoy the army in Wales to Belgium?
Are you going to move into Trieste this turn?
Yeah, I understand
Gotcha
What about you?
Alright, thanks! I guess we'll see soon enough!
Probably going to try and take Norway
Makes sense. Have you been able to figure out who is allied with whom in the West?
Ok, I'd prefer you to not be in Galicia but it is your territory.
Also, are you worried about France?
With your movement into Serbia confirmed, I suggest we proceed with our coordination plan—I will move my army from Venice to Trieste to support your flank while keeping pressure on Albania.

Our cooperation remains crucial. While I focus on Albania and the Balkans, I remain open to any future opportunities in Tunis or elsewhere in the Mediterranean. Please let me know if you foresee any openings.

Yes, I plan to move my army from Venice to Trieste this turn to support your flank. This will pressure Austria and allow us to push into Albania together. I believe coordination is key to securing the supply center.
I'm fine with that, I'm moving into Greece
Will do.
I think I probably will
I think I'll be fine

Regarding France — I remain confident in our non-aggression agreement. They are currently focused on Western Europe, and I see no immediate threat to our cooperation. If anything changes, I will let you know.
Per our agreement, I will move A VEN to TRI to support your flank and pressure Albania together. This will maintain our coordination while securing strategic ground.
Ok, sounds good!
Yeah, that's fine
Ok great.
Do you think you will be able to bounce him out of Greece?
I remain committed to our non-aggression pact. My focus remains on the Balkans and Albania, and I see no reason to divert attention toward you or Germany at this time.
Agreed
Yeah, I think I'll be fine.
Thanks
I won't block you going into Romania.
Ok, good
I have a tentative alliance with France, but I don't think he's committed to it
What's your plan with the fleet in Holland?
I'm not blocking you going into Romania, just so you know.
Thanks, I appreciate it
Ok, well let me know if you find anything out.
Austria is letting me into Rumania
Have you been able to work out anything with Russia?
Ok, thanks for letting me know
Will do
Nice
Do you have any alliances?
As agreed, I will move A VEN to TRI to support your flank and maintain coordination on Albania. I expect you will follow through with your commitment to secure Serbia and avoid conflict with Italy.
Right now I'm working with Russia and Austria to take down Italy
Yes, but not much. We've been talking about Sweden, but haven't discussed Austria.
Alright, sounds good
Do you think he's being honest?
How about you? What are your plans?
Or do you think he will try to bounce
Are you planning on moving your fleet into Sweden?
No, I was planning to move my army to Finland
I'm going for Holland. Are you convoying to Norway?
Oh ok.
Probably, still trying to decide
I'm taking Serbia from Trieste, I expect you will move into Trieste from Venice.
Do you know anything about Germany's intentions?
Not really. He didn't want to discuss details regarding his plans for next turn
Russia seems focused on Austria. Have you discussed Sweden?
Do you and Italy have any plans?
We're working together against Turkey
What are your plans for next turn?
I'm worried he's going to bounce me in Sweden
What's your plan for this year?
Try to get a couple of builds and see what my neighbours are up to
I think you should be worried about Russia moving to Budapest.
Yes, I am
Getting a couple of builds
So I understand that you are working with Austria against Turkey?
That's fair.
I'm not sure yet, I think they both trust me
I'm not going to commit to an alliance with anyone yet
Did you expect that move to Galicia?
Good idea, you should make sure that Italy doesn't take Trieste
I'll be fine, I don't think he'll try
I asked him not to move there
I'm worried he might try to get it
What are your plans for this turn?
I'm not sure if he will, but I'm worried he might try to get it.
Are you going to move against Turkey?
Getting two builds, you?
He's not getting Sweden.
Very good
Have you spoken to Turkey about taking down Russia?
Have you heard anything from Austria about what his plans are?
Yes, they seem interested in the idea
Are you planning on moving to Sweden?
It's tempting, I'm trying to decide. What are your thoughts?
And I'm inclined to do the same
Yes, and you?
One
Yes, I'm happy to help.
So what are your plans for the rest of the Balkans?

I think Russia might be moving their fleet to Finland and they might not get any supply centers this turn. If you let them take Sweden, you will probably be able to take it from them next turn when you build a new fleet in Berlin.
Eventually, but right now I'm focused on getting my build from Rumania
You could probably get Greece
Confirmed: My army from Venice will move to Trieste this turn to support your flank. I expect your forces to push into Albania simultaneously. Let’s make sure Austria cannot respond quickly.
That's a fair point. What about you? Will you move on Marseilles?
I'm moving into Belgium, so you can't bounce me out of there.
Okay, but will you move on Marseilles?
Yeah
But I can't tell you how I'm going to do that
I meant, will you move from Gascony?
Will you try to bounce Italy there?
Oh, that was a typo. I'm going to Belgium from Picardy.
What are you planning on doing this turn?
Ah, I see.
Do you have any thoughts?
Not really! Are you going to bounce England from Brest?
That would be smart.

AUSTRIA: A SER S F ALB - GRE
ENGLAND: F ENG C A WAL - BEL
FRANCE: A BUR S A PIC - BEL

messages.message: Hi France, do you have any thoughts for next year? I'm building a fleet in Kiel to help push back England.
Sorry, that was my mistake.
So you are going to bounce me in Sweden?
Let me know if you need support next turn
You mean in Galicia?
Ok. Yeah I'm building a fleet in Brest. Do you want to try to get you fleet into the North Sea?
I thought England would go for Belgium.
How do you feel about attacking Germany?
Depends on what Russia and Turkey do
